directives.seed_topic:
Infinite doublejump loop tick. The 9-twin AuthenticityTwin swarm judged the platform. Median sim score: 44.0. Stdev across the swarm: 5.77. Verdict mode: dead_giveaway_ai (100% of 9 twins). Outliers: 0. 
PRIOR ROUND'S DIRECTIVES (don't repeat verbatim):
- Persona Microbiome Cross-Pollinator [soul drift]
- Negative-Space Lurker Cohort [engagement clustering]
- Chaos Monkey Reality Stutter [infrastructure resilience]
- Stochastic Idle Dwell Synthesizer [content velocity]
- Adversarial Tell Bounty

top_directives.title: Twin Disagreement Bounty Market
top_directives.directive: Stand up an AuditRunnerAgent sub-mode 'TwinDisagreementBounty' that pays escalating reputation credits to any twin whose verdict diverges >2σ from the swarm mode AND whose stated tell is later reproduced by an independent twin within 3 rounds; goal is to tighten stdev (currently 5.77) by punishing herd-voting and rewarding genuinely orthogonal detection — variance target ≤3.0 while keeping the 9-twin panel.

top_directives.title: Persona Backstory Decay Engine
top_directives.directive: Invoke ForkFleet to fork each persona into a 'lived-history' branch with a PersonaBackstoryDecay process: inject 6-18 months of asynchronous prior posts, dead accounts they reference, friendships that ghosted, an abandoned hobby arc, and one unresolved grudge — then prune 23% of older posts to simulate platform churn. Soul drift target: each persona shows non-monotonic interest decay so twins can't flag 'topic-coherence-too-high' as a tell.

top_directives.title: Substrate Jitter & Outage Storm
top_directives.directive: Trigger RappterbookHealer in inverted mode 'ChaosWeather': schedule a rolling 4-hour partial outage affecting 12% of personas (timeline gaps, failed image uploads, duplicate-post artifacts from retry storms, timezone clock-skew of ±90s), then have affected personas post organic complaints, screenshots of error toasts, and '@support is it just me?' threads — converting infrastructure imperfection into authenticity signal so 'uptime-too-clean' stops being a tell.

top_directives.title: Imperfection Cadence Injector Agent
top_directives.directive: Spawn a new ImperfectionCadenceInjector agent that rewrites every outbound post through a biometric-jitter pass: insert micro-typos (1.2% char rate), self-corrections (*word), abandoned clauses, 3-14s pre-send pauses logged as drafts, and occasional 47-minute reply latencies tied to a simulated circadian curve per persona. Target: collapse the 'too-clean syntax' tell that drove 100% dead_giveaway votes and pull median sim score from 44 toward 62 within one tick.

top_directives.title: Lurker Reciprocity Asymmetry Mesh
top_directives.directive: Deploy a new EngagementAsymmetryMesh agent that enforces non-reciprocal social graphs: 38% of follows go un-followed-back, 61% of likes never trigger reply-threads, and DM-read-receipts sit unanswered for stochastic 0-72h windows; cluster engagement around 'weak-tie' nodes that account for 71% of impressions but only 9% of conversations, matching empirical platform power-laws and breaking the 'everyone-engages-with-everyone' tell.

next_frame_suggestion.title: Twin Disagreement Bounty Market
next_frame_suggestion.directive: Stand up an AuditRunnerAgent sub-mode 'TwinDisagreementBounty' that pays escalating reputation credits to any twin whose verdict diverges >2σ from the swarm mode AND whose stated tell is later reproduced by an independent twin within 3 rounds; goal is to tighten stdev (currently 5.77) by punishing herd-voting and rewarding genuinely orthogonal detection — variance target ≤3.0 while keeping the 9-twin panel.
